name: Programmed Illusion
description: You create an illusion of an object, creature, or other visible phenomenon within 120 feet that remains imperceptible until a condition you specify occurs within 30 feet of the area. The illusion can be no larger than a 30‑foot cube and may include sounds. When the trigger condition occurs, the illusion springs into existence and performs as you described for up to 5 minutes, then disappears and remains dormant for 10 minutes before it can be activated again. A creature can use its action to examine the image; on a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC it discerns the illusion, can see through it, and any noise it makes sounds hollow to that creature.
